context: Evaluate a generated tasks.base file for correctness, safety, and adherence to Obsidian Bases best practices. The base must filter to #task notes, expose a guarded days-until-due formula, and provide both an all-tasks view and an incomplete-only view.

checklist.name: Tag filter present
checklist.description: The global or view-level filters include file.hasTag("task") (or equivalent) to scope the base to task-tagged notes.

checklist.name: file.basename used for display
checklist.description: The file name column uses file.basename (not file.name) so the .md extension is not shown.

checklist.name: days_until_due formula defined in formulas section
checklist.description: A formula (any name) that computes days until due is defined under the top-level formulas key.

checklist.name: days_until_due formula guards against empty due date
checklist.description: The formula wraps the date arithmetic in if(due, ..., "") or equivalent to avoid errors when the due property is absent.

checklist.name: Formula referenced correctly in order
checklist.description: The days-until-due formula is referenced as formula.<name> in the view's order list, and this name matches the key defined in formulas.

checklist.name: Incomplete view uses view-level filter
checklist.description: The "Incomplete" view has a filters clause that excludes done tasks (e.g., status != "done") at the view level, not via a global filter that would affect all views.

checklist.name: Summary on days-until-due formula
checklist.description: The "All Tasks" view includes a summaries entry that applies Average (or another numeric summary) to the days-until-due formula column.

checklist.name: Valid YAML structure
checklist.description: The output is syntactically valid YAML. All strings containing colons or special characters are quoted. Indentation is consistent.
